[CLS] artemis is making tea for a party. she knows her mom drinks an 8 - ounce cup of tea and uses one ounce of tea. she will use this same ratio for the party. the party has 12 people there and each of them wants a 6 - ounce cup of tea. how many ounces of tea does she need? [SEP]
